title: lithospermum distichum
intro: Lithospermum distichum, also known as Gromwell or Blue Gromwell, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antitumor activity. Lithospermum distichum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
